top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN b.category = 'Parking' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(b.amount) AS parking_percentage
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.event_name = 'November Speaker';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN b.category = 'Parking' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(b.amount) AS parking_percentage
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.event_name = 'November Speaker';

SELECT 
    100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN b.category = 'Parking' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) / SUM(b.amount) AS parking_percentage
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.event_name = 'November Speaker';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN b.category = 'Parking' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(b.amount) AS parking_percentage
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.event_name = 'November Speaker';

SELECT 
    CAST((SELECT SUM(b.amount) FROM budget b JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id WHERE e.event_name = 'November Speaker' AND b.category = 'Parking') AS REAL) * 100 / 
    (SELECT SUM(b.amount) FROM budget b JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id WHERE e.event_name = 'November Speaker') AS parking_percentage

SELECT 
    100.0 * 
    (SELECT amount FROM budget WHERE link_to_event = (SELECT event_id FROM event WHERE event_name = 'November Speaker') AND category = 'Parking') /
    (SELECT SUM(amount) FROM budget WHERE link_to_event = (SELECT event_id FROM event WHERE event_name = 'November Speaker')) AS parking_percentage;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN b.category = 'Parking' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / SUM(b.amount) AS parking_percentage
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE e.event_name = 'November Speaker';
